running.runningReasons: array of running reason enum names
running.preferredRunTimes: array of run time enum names

reason: Root-level running preference fields locked the profile document to running while Catch now supports multiple activity kinds. activityPreferences.running preserves existing product behavior while giving the schema a generic parent for future activity-specific preferences.

phases.description: Use activityPreferences.running as the first activity-specific nested preference object.
Add contracts/embedded/activity_preferences.schema.json and require activityPreferences on users and publicProfiles.

Dart domain models, UpdateUserProfilePatch, Functions projection/update paths, Firestore rules, validators, demo data, and tests read/write the nested shape. Domain fromJson keeps legacy root-field read tolerance for older documents.

Remote cleanup copied remaining legacy root running fields into activityPreferences.running and deleted root fields in dev, staging, and prod on 2026-05-26. The one-time cleanup tool was retired on 2026-06-02.

guards: tool/data/validate_firestore_data.mjs validates activityPreferences and warns on retired root profile fields; run with --fail-on-warning after cleanup.
No active cleanup tool remains; retired root profile fields should not reappear after the completed dev, staging, and prod cleanup.
